description: The ExternalSlotSaver will ensure that the ``TargetSlot`` is saved as a child of the slot this component is on if the slot isn't already in the hierarchy.

fields.TargetSlot: The slot to target when saving.
fields.SaveActiveSelfOverride: When not null, save this rather than ``TargetSlot``'s current active self value.
fields.SaveLocalPositionOverride: When not null, save this rather than ``TargetSlot``'s current position value.
fields.SaveLocalRotationOverride: When not null, save this rather than ``TargetSlot``'s current rotation value.
fields.SaveLocalScaleOverride: When not null, save this rather than ``TargetSlot``'s current scale value.
fields.IgnoreWhenNonPersistentSelf: Whether to not save the external slot if we are non persistent ourselves.
